Variables.Name: SceneTextureId
Variables.Description: Which scene texture (screen aligned texture) we want to make a lookup into

Variables.Name: bClampUVs
Variables.Description: Clamps texture coordinates to the range 0 to 1. Incurs a performance cost.

Variables.Name: bFiltered
Variables.Description: Whether to use point sampled texture lookup (default) or using [bi-linear] filtered (can be slower, avoid faceted lock with distortions), some SceneTextures cannot be filtered
